race.comment: CONDUCIVE (9) showed glimpses before the debut but never got into the race over 1200m at Pinjarra and went for a break straight after. Her trial this time in was very strong and the form out of her debut stood up. Pike sticks from the latest trial and she looks well placed in this provincial maiden. HARVEY'S WISH (10) is on debut for the Ryan Hill stable, winning her latest trial over 400m at Lark Hill. That was back in December though so she hasn't been seen publicly this time in but she has shown enough in her two outings to suggest she can run a bold race however. SPARTAN LASS (8) was sound on resumption when beaten 2.4L and has bolted in at the trials here since. Nottle was on board for that outing and she remains with the filly today. Has plenty of early speed and will take catching. GOD'LL GETYA (2) disappointed over further last start and looks better suited coming back to this trip. LUZ DEL SOL (12) comes back from the 2YO Magic Millions and has claims against the older horse.
